generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a former intelligence analyst, I've seen firsthand how strategic autonomy keeps us safe. My neighbor, a veteran, told me last week how local defense projects create jobs and protect our communities. Supporting local defense isn't just about security—it's about fairness and trust in our own capabilities. #StrongerTogether
